q: How to run a Tier 1 factory with 40% less experienced staff
diagnostic: The experience gap is not a training problem — it is a wisdom problem. The Systems Architect and throughput analyst agents carry the senior engineer judgment that is walking out the door, reading MES data the way a 30-year veteran would.
answer: The experience gap is not a training problem — it is a wisdom problem. The Systems Architect and throughput analyst agents carry the senior engineer judgment that is walking out the door, reading MES data the way a 30-year veteran would.
description: Non-scalable wisdom — the company's strategic DNA lives in 2–3 people's heads. When they leave, the soul leaves with them.
symptom: Critical systems break because the only person who knew how it worked left. New hires reinvent the wheel. Due diligence reveals a house of cards.
